action: From a clean checkout, start the fresh owned chain, contracts, Graph Node, analytics, and web stack with one command; run strict health, advance one block, rerun health, and stop.

expectedAssertions.statement: Startup owns a fresh deterministic epoch and serves the matching deployment manifest.
Strict health requires exact RPC, indexer, and analytics head and hash parity plus configured web identity.
After controlled block advance all authorities converge without stale-epoch data.
Shutdown removes every owned resource and repeated start does not reuse orphaned state.

negativePaths.trigger: Analytics or indexer responds at an older head or different hash.
Startup is interrupted or prior owned state remains.

prerequisites: The documented lifecycle and strict health commands are available.
Required resources are free or owned by the lifecycle command.
recovery: Fail health closed, restart the lagging owned component, and await exact convergence.
Run cleanup, verify no owned resources remain, and start a fresh epoch.
title: Owned full stack starts, reconciles, advances, and cleans

action: Using the deterministic wrapped-native and USDC fixture in native mode, execute ETH-to-token swap, one-sided native add, and native-output withdrawal; inspect the wrapper in ERC-20 mode.

expectedAssertions.statement: Every native transaction uses exact reviewed msg.value, preserves ETH gas reserve, and never requests ETH approval.
Canonical receipts, gas, token, ETH, and WNATIVE deltas reconcile for swap, add, and withdrawal.
Wrapped native-add dust is disclosed and reconciled as WNATIVE, not ETH.
ERC-20 mode labels the wrapper as WETH or configured wrapped symbol and uses allowance semantics.
Wrong value, insufficient gas, stale context, rejection, revert, or native receipt failure never reports success.

negativePaths.trigger: Amount plus reserve exceeds ETH balance or encoded value differs from review.
The wrapper is selected explicitly as ERC-20.
Wallet rejection, router revert, or native receive failure occurs.

prerequisites: The deterministic native pool is healthy and reconciled.
A clean funded account has ETH and the required token.
Pre-write wallet, manifest, RPC, indexer, and analytics checks agree.
recovery: Return focus and refresh balance, gas reserve, quote, minima, and simulation.
Retry only after terminal failure and exact-context revalidation.
title: Native fixture proves ETH and wrapped-mode semantics
